# UC-17.5.3 · Forcepoint Email Security Quarantine Volume and Release Patterns (`forcepoint:email:kv`)

## Description

Quarantine spikes can indicate a phishing wave or mis-tuned anti-spam thresholds starving the business.

## Value

Messaging admins tune rules without disabling protection outright.

## Implementation

Install the Insights SIEM app, configure HEC inputs per product line, and align indexes (`proxy`, `email`, `dlp`, `sase`). Normalize usernames to enterprise SAMAccountName.

## SPL

```spl
index=email sourcetype="forcepoint:email:kv" earliest=-7d
| where match(lower(action),"(?i)quarantine")
| timechart span=1h count by reason
```

## CIM SPL

```spl
| tstats `summariesonly` count
  from datamodel=Email.Email
  by Email.user, Email.action, Email.src, Email.dest span=1h
| sort - count
```

## Visualization

Timechart (quarantines), pie (reason).

- [Splunkbase — Forcepoint Insights SIEM App](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/8053)
